meta.title: Litro — Save on every fill-up and parking spot
meta.description: Real-time fuel prices, parking, route planning and smart alerts. All of Europe in one app.

banner.title: Litro
banner.tagline: Your AI copilot for savings on every fill-up

europeHero.title: Helping you save on every km across Europe.
europeHero.subtitle: Daily-updated official fuel prices across the 15 countries we already cover. And more on the way.

hero.title: Save on every litre.
hero.subtitle: Real-time fuel prices, available parking and smart route planning. All of Europe in your pocket.

features.sectionSubtitle: Seven features that change the way you drive.

parking.title: Park without circling.
parking.body: Real-time location of parking spots in every Spanish city. Reserve before you arrive.

prices.title: The cheapest prices, one tap away.
prices.body: Daily-updated price cards across Spain, France, Italy, Portugal, Germany, Austria and Greece.

alerts.title: Tell me when it drops.
alerts.body: Set alerts and we'll ping you the moment fuel hits the price you want. By station or by zone.

map.title: Everything near you.
map.body: Gas station and parking pins on a smooth map. Filter by brand, price or availability.

routes.title: We pick the cheapest stops for you.
routes.body: Plan routes with up to 6 stops at the cheapest stations along the way. Save up to 15% per trip.

favorites.title: Your spots, always at hand.
favorites.body: Save your favorite gas stations and parkings. Quick access and special notifications.

savings.title: See how much you've saved.
savings.body: A counter that tracks every euro you've saved with Litro. Because every fill-up matters.

contact.title: Reach millions of drivers across Europe.
contact.subtitle: Parking lots, garages, car washes, dealers or individuals: if your business wants visibility in front of a European audience of active drivers, let's talk.

cta.title: Start saving today.
cta.subtitle: Litro is free. Download it and feel the difference on your next fill-up.
